# AYUSHMAN ENTRIES TO DELETE (Short Answers)

Delete these 5 keys from responses.json:

1. KEY: 08a7f4c956a0ab77d62d52b20457557e
   MESSAGE: hinglish:Ayushman card kaise banwaye?
   LENGTH: 170 chars (SHORT - DELETE THIS)

   MESSAGE: english:Ayushman Bharat Yojana kya hai?
   LENGTH: 166 chars (SHORT - DELETE THIS)
   
3. KEY: 822f3903f08cb50d3cd0c2893e207fde
   MESSAGE: english:What is Ayushman Bharat Yojana?
   LENGTH: 166 chars (SHORT - DELETE THIS)
   
4. KEY: ab6f745a467ee589c972cd6ce23fcdc0
   MESSAGE: english:How to make Ayushman card?
   LENGTH: 148 chars (SHORT - DELETE THIS)
   
5. KEY: 4b3188a706258e751fc7c5e0804a9b4e
   MESSAGE: hinglish:Ayushman Bharat Yojana kya hai?
   LENGTH: 198 chars (SHORT - DELETE THIS)

---

HOW TO DELETE MANUALLY:

1. Open: VAANI/ai-backend/cache/responses-formatted.json
2. Search for each KEY above (Ctrl+F)
3. Delete the entire entry including the key and all its data
4. Make sure to remove the comma after the previous entry if needed
5. Save the file
6. Run: node train-and-test-loop.js (to add detailed answers back)

OR

Run this command to auto-delete:
node delete-short-ayushman.js
